# SceneSmith Studio

> AI-powered storytelling studio for screenwriters, novelists, worldbuilders, comedians, and audio storytellers.

SceneSmith Studio is a writing platform for building better stories, scene by scene. It combines a professional writing workspace with AI-assisted tools for story development, character work, outlining, storyboarding, table reads, and pitch preparation.

## Pages

- [Home](/): Product overview and entry point to the studio.
- [Pricing](/pricing): Plans and pricing for SceneSmith Studio.
- [Sign in](/auth): Sign in or create an account to start writing.
